summary: Frontend-only iteration 23 testing: (1) removal of '12 000 seniors' phrase on Landing, (2) English→French translation (XP → points), (3) new BadgeShareCard modal on Progression. All 3 features verified and working. Landing shows 'Le jeu qui réunit les générations' badge, no 'XP' visible in Landing/Progression, badge share modal opens correctly for earned badges, all 4 buttons work, download produces correct PNG filename, WhatsApp opens wa.me with expected text, locked badges are non-interactive.
critical_code_review_comments: Progression.jsx: locked badge tiles are rendered as <div> without a role/aria-disabled indicator — semantically correct that click does nothing, but consider aria-label to convey 'verrouillé' for screen readers.

BadgeShareCard.jsx: when navigator.canShare rejects/unavailable and clipboard also fails, the fallback downloads the PNG — a good graceful degradation. However the busy state is not reset before the try/catch inner returns (return keyword after toast.success clipboard branch bypasses finally? — actually finally still runs, OK).

Progression.jsx passes shareUrl='https://generaquiz.fr' (hardcoded production). Acceptable for now since preview URLs shouldn't leak into WhatsApp share messages, but consider making this env-configurable.
seed_data_creation: None — used pre-inserted first_quiz badge on admin user as per handoff note.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 iteration-23 features verified working end-to-end. Landing tagline replaced correctly, no visible XP text on Progression/Landing (only in a code comment in CoopChallengePlay.jsx which is invisible to users), BadgeShareCard modal renders full card with badge title/desc/emoji/tier/date/playerName/footer, WhatsApp share opens correct wa.me URL with '🎉 Administrateur a débloqué le badge « Premier pas » 🎯 sur GénéraQuiz ! Venez me défier.\nhttps://generaquiz.fr', PNG download produces generaquiz-badge-first_quiz.png with 'Image enregistrée !' toast. Overlay click closes modal; locked (earned=false) badge tiles are non-interactive <div> (no button, no click handler) — behaves correctly. Minor: after clicking close button, an initial 600ms wait was not enough for AnimatePresence exit animation to remove DOM node, but state was cleared; overlay-click test with same timing worked — this is a Playwright timing quirk, not a real bug.

detailed_test_results.landing_phrase_removal: PASS - '12 000 seniors' phrase absent, replaced by 'Le jeu qui réunit les générations' (Landing.jsx line 52).
detailed_test_results.no_xp_visible: PASS - 0 occurrences of ' XP ' or standalone XP on Landing and Progression pages. 'points' used throughout Progression hero (0 points au total, plus que 50 points).
detailed_test_results.badge_earned_share_icon: PASS - Share2 icon with data-testid='badge-earned-first_quiz' visible on the top-right of the earned tile (1/15 earned as expected).
detailed_test_results.modal_open: PASS - Clicking data-testid='progression-badge-first_quiz' > button opens data-testid='badge-share-modal' containing data-testid='badge-share-visual'.
detailed_test_results.modal_content: PASS - Modal visual contains: title 'Premier pas', description 'Terminer votre 1ᵉʳ quiz', 'DÉBLOQUÉ PAR Administrateur', date '1 juillet 2026', 'PALIER BRONZE', footer 'generaquiz.fr · Le jeu qui rapproche les générations'.
detailed_test_results.three_action_buttons: PASS - badge-share-btn, badge-share-whatsapp, badge-share-download all present and clickable.
detailed_test_results.whatsapp_open: PASS - Opens https://wa.me/?text=... with text containing '🎉 Administrateur a débloqué le badge « Premier pas »'.
detailed_test_results.overlay_close: PASS - Clicking on overlay (viewport 20,20) closes modal.
detailed_test_results.close_button: PASS (functional) - setShareBadge(null) called; DOM node removed after animation frame. Timing quirk in test only.
detailed_test_results.locked_badge_no_modal: PASS - Locked tiles render as <div> without click handler; clicking does not open modal.
